title: hieracium calcareum subsp. crinopodum
intro: Hieracium calcareum subsp. crinopodum, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support liver and kidney health due to its high content of flavonoids and sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium calcareum subsp. crinopodum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and address various health concerns.
